body:

| | There are only a **_couple of hours left_** until our midnight match deadline, Peter! Make sure to **[donate tonight to have twice the impact and ensure that we're in the best position possible to take on Sen. Cornyn after the runoff!](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890372/7f51f7bc/4f423e20/4ef127ac/2718155901/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEyMTgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-weekendmatch?refcode=email_20200413.4nd__1218__&amount=10")**

I know my team has been telling you all weekend how important your donation is right now, and they're right. I won't have as much time as the nominee as we had originally expected, which means that we have to build up our resources _now_.

**This grassroots team has been making me proud ever since we started our campaign. Thank you for your continued support, and don 't forget to pitch in before the match expires at midnight!** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: Aaron Slutkin
subject: We're talking with J.D. Scholten on Saturday!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Franken for Iowa
body:
Last week we had a virtual event scheduled with J.D. Scholten -- the Democratic candidate in Iowa's 4th, running against Steve King -- but unfortunately it had to be rescheduled.
|
---
| |
---

| | Hi, crew, Last week we had a virtual event scheduled with J.D. Scholten -- the Democratic candidate in Iowa's 4th, running against Steve King -- but unfortunately it had to be rescheduled. Now, the admiral will be live with J.D. on Saturday, April 18, at 11AM CST. **_[Here's the link for the event.](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f249c/33365068/4a761537/3f8bf37f/330097420/VEsH/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://www.facebook.com/events/254650229022208/") _We hope to see many of you there.** | [RSVP >>](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f249c/33365068/4a761537/3f8bf37f/330097420/VEsE/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://www.facebook.com/events/254650229022208/")
---
**If you can 't make it, consider [_following us on Twitter_](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f249c/33365068/4a761537/3f8bf378/330097420/VEsF/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://twitter.com/FrankenforIowa"), [_joining our Facebook group_](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f249c/33365068/4a761537/3f8bf379/330097420/VEsC/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://www.facebook.com/groups/iowansforfranken/"), or [_chipping in $5 right now to help Admiral Mike win in November_](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f249c/33365068/4a761537/3f8bf37a/330097420/VEsD/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf2020q2?refcode=FRA_20200413_jdvth2_em_org_all_l1&amount=5")**.
Thank you, and looking forward to seeing you online!
Aaron S.
Communications Director

[DONATE >>](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f249c/33365068/4a761537/3f8bf37b/330097420/VEsA/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf2020q2?refcode=FRA_20200413_jdvth2_em_org_all_ftr")
---

subject: ✍️ Sign on to save Fauci ✍️

body:
You are receiving this email from 314 Action Fund because you've previously expressed interest in our efforts. If you'd rather not get all of our updates you can [click here](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4fb4/4bd7760e/5a695248/77afa9e2/3294593991/VEsH/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=1+-+click+here&utm_campaign=314_EM_PT_200413_6MO_1MNTL-1MO-1MC_STD_2_protectdrfauci&source=314_EM_PT_200413_6MO_1MNTL-1MO-1MC_STD_2_protectdrfauci&refcode=314_EM_PT_200413_6MO_1MNTL-1MO-1MC_STD_2_protectdrfauci") for only the most important emails, or you can click [here](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4fb4/4bd7760e/5a695248/77afa9e1/3294593991/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZQUWtaVlUwTkJWRVZFVWtWRFNWQkpSVTVVU1VRbEpRPT0iOiI1YTY5NTI0OCIsIkpTVlBRa1pWVTBOQlZFVkVUVUZKVEVsT1IxTkZUa1JKUkNVbCI6IjI5YmI0ZmI0In0%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/oneclickunsubscribe/5a695248/29bb4fb4?utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=2+-+here&utm_campaign=314_EM_PT_200413_6MO_1MNTL-1MO-1MC_STD_2_protectdrfauci&source=314_EM_PT_200413_6MO_1MNTL-1MO-1MC_STD_2_protectdrfauci&refcode=314_EM_PT_200413_6MO_1MNTL-1MO-1MC_STD_2_protectdrfauci") to unsubscribe.
| **Yesterday morning:** Dr. Anthony S. Fauci said that more lives could have been saved from coronavirus if the country shut down sooner.

**Last night:** President Trump voiced his displeasure with Dr. Fauci's honesty via Twitter. _He retweeted a "Time to #FireFauci" tweet._

**It 's simple:** We can't let President Trump get his way and fire Dr. Fauci amid a global pandemic.

[Add your name and demand that Trump not fire Dr. Fauci->](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4fb4/4bd7760e/5a695248/77afa9e0/3294593991/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/protect-dr-faucis-job?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=3+-+Add+your+name+and+demand+that+Trump+not+&utm_campaign=314_EM_PT_200413_6MO_1MNTL-1MO-1MC_STD_2_protectdrfauci&source=314_EM_PT_200413_6MO_1MNTL-1MO-1MC_STD_2_protectdrfauci&refcode=314_EM_PT_200413_6MO_1MNTL-1MO-1MC_STD_2_protectdrfauci")

| [Add Your Name](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4fb4/4bd7760e/5a695248/77afa9ef/3294593991/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/protect-dr-faucis-job?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=4+-+Add+Your+Name&utm_campaign=314_EM_PT_200413_6MO_1MNTL-1MO-1MC_STD_2_protectdrfauci&source=314_EM_PT_200413_6MO_1MNTL-1MO-1MC_STD_2_protectdrfauci&refcode=314_EM_PT_200413_6MO_1MNTL-1MO-1MC_STD_2_protectdrfauci")
---

Listen, this is par for the course with Trump -- **this is how he treats doctors and scientists who tell the truth.**

Whether it is the climate crisis or a global pandemic, Trump hates working with people who believe in facts and science.

But this situation is different. Dr. Fauci has dedicated his life to fighting infectious diseases, and his steady hand has guided our country through this crisis.

**_We can 't afford to lose him._**

[If you agree, then add your name and demand that Trump does not fire Dr. Fauci->](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4fb4/4bd7760e/5a695248/77afa9ee/3294593991/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/protect-dr-faucis-job?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=5+-+If+you+agree+then+add+your+name+and+dema&utm_campaign=314_EM_PT_200413_6MO_1MNTL-1MO-1MC_STD_2_protectdrfauci&source=314_EM_PT_200413_6MO_1MNTL-1MO-1MC_STD_2_protectdrfauci&refcode=314_EM_PT_200413_6MO_1MNTL-1MO-1MC_STD_2_protectdrfauci")

314 Action

314 Action is a grassroots community of over 1.77 million people working to elect Democratic scientists who will use science and facts to address some of our most pressing issues like climate change and health care. In 2018 we played a pivotal role in flipping the US House of Representatives by electing 9 Democratic scientists to the House and Senate as well as over 100 to key legislative districts while raising over $5.2 million with an average donation of just $27.55. Now we're focused on flipping the US Senate, defeating 25 climate deniers in Congress and flipping key state legislatures across the country.

If you'd like to support 314 Action, you can **[click here](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4fb4/4bd7760e/5a695248/77afa9eb/3294593991/VEsO/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314-emfooter?refcode=emfooter&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=8+-+click+here&utm_campaign=314_EM_PT_200413_6MO_1MNTL-1MO-1MC_STD_2_protectdrfauci&source=314_EM_PT_200413_6MO_1MNTL-1MO-1MC_STD_2_protectdrfauci")** to make a donation.

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: a bit overwhelming
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
|
#
Hello, I know how difficult this time is for so many folks across the country. It’s hard not to feel overwhelmed or scared. But I want you to know that no matter what, I’m fighting to give you the leadership you deserve during critical moments like these. So before I ask you to pitch in to our campaign to help us take back Colorado, I wanted to let you know exactly what your donation means: **When you add a donation to our campaign for U.S. Senate, you’re making a declaration that you’re tired of business as usual in Washington.** That you’re ready for new, independent leadership that will always put Colorado first. **When you pitch in $5 here or $10 there, you’re proving that we don’t need corporate PACs to power our fight.** And unlike my opponent, we don’t want them. Everyday folks like you chipping in what they can makes all the difference. **When you contribute whatever you can, you’re sending a message that you won’t let Mitch McConnell and his wealthy friends buy Colorado’s Senate seat.** No matter what the GOP throws our way, your donations help keep us strong enough to defeat them. As you may know, the majority of our contributions today come from messages just like this one. I know they can be a bit overwhelming at times, but they make a huge difference for our team. The truth is, the work we do today will decide the outcome of this election. Whether we reach our goals, especially now as the GOP ramps up their attacks, will determine whether or not we can win this race and flip this seat. **So, I have to ask: if you’re financially able, will you make a contribution to our campaign before our mid-month fundraising deadline ends on Friday? Anything you can give helps us build a movement that can go the distance:** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 now ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17136399/183955210/1428959311?refcode=jwh-em-200414&express_lane=true&amount=10&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDhiYjI3My02OTdlLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fju8ddhNvEg5pvzVvs3UZVu5oZGx9dIJofwnHXdoVdY=)

clean_body: | Hello, I know how difficult this time is for so many folks across the country. It’s hard not to feel overwhelmed or scared. But I want you to know that no matter what, I’m fighting to give you the leadership you deserve during critical moments like these. So before I ask you to pitch in to our campaign to help us take back Colorado, I wanted to let you know exactly what your donation means: When you add a donation to our campaign for U.S. Senate, you’re making a declaration that you’re tired of business as usual in Washington. That you’re ready for new, independent leadership that will always put Colorado first. When you pitch in $5 here or $10 there, you’re proving that we don’t need corporate PACs to power our fight. And unlike my opponent, we don’t want them. Everyday folks like you chipping in what they can makes all the difference. When you contribute whatever you can, you’re sending a message that you won’t let Mitch McConnell and his wealthy friends buy Colorado’s Senate seat. No matter what the GOP throws our way, your donations help keep us strong enough to defeat them. As you may know, the majority of our contributions today come from messages just like this one. I know they can be a bit overwhelming at times, but they make a huge difference for our team. The truth is, the work we do today will decide the outcome of this election. Whether we reach our goals, especially now as the GOP ramps up their attacks, will determine whether or not we can win this race and flip this seat. So, I have to ask: if you’re financially able, will you make a contribution to our campaign before our mid-month fundraising deadline ends on Friday? Anything you can give helps us build a movement that can go the distance: If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = I hope you know how much your support means to me. Together, we’re building a campaign strong enough to take back Colorado and put power in the hands of the people. Thank you. — John P.S. We know this is a difficult time, so please take care of yourself and your loved ones and only pitch in if you can afford to do so. name: Team Michelle
subject: Thank health care workers!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MICHELLE FOR KANSAS
body:
_Mayor De La Isla’s number one priority during this crisis is to slow the spread of COVID-19 in Kansas. In accordance with CDC guidelines, our campaign has canceled all in-person events, but we will continue engaging with voters and supporters online through email and social media. Thank you for reading and continuing to be part of our team._

Friends,

All across Kansas, our courageous health care workers are putting their well-being at risk to save lives. They are on the frontlines of this crisis, helping to ensure all Kansans get access to the quality care they deserve.

To show our gratitude for their bravery and dedication during this difficult time, we decided to put together a card to share with them -- and we want to give you a chance to sign it!

**[Take a moment to sign our thank you card to health care workers. You can even leave them a note!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17136837/183963378/99073678?gpsid=8_122_12393&ms=em20_200414_card1_engg_gq_ful__TM_ettx&refcode=em20_200414_card1_engg_gq_ful__TM_ettx&utm_campaign=em20_200414_card1_engg_gq_ful__TM_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mdli&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTUzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZDA4NDRkOS02YjdlLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mJ_vAlB8CeL8uzuKMAp1T__cIFvYUIvnTNHh50MZ5bY=&emci=ba0d79b5-5b7e-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=0d0844d9-6b7e-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=9593007)**
[SIGN THE CARD](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17136838/183963379/99073678?gpsid=8_122_12393&ms=em20_200414_card1_engg_gq_ful__TM_ettx&refcode=em20_200414_card1_engg_gq_ful__TM_ettx&utm_campaign=em20_200414_card1_engg_gq_ful__TM_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mdli&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTUzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZDA4NDRkOS02YjdlLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mJ_vAlB8CeL8uzuKMAp1T__cIFvYUIvnTNHh50MZ5bY=&emci=ba0d79b5-5b7e-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=0d0844d9-6b7e-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=9593007)
Our health care professionals are heroes, and their sacrifices are helping keep our communities healthy and safe. This card is our team's way of letting them know we're grateful for everything they're doing to protect us, and we hope you'll join us by adding your name.

**[Sign our card to join us in thanking the health care professionals fighting on the frontlines of this crisis.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17136839/183963380/99073678?gpsid=8_122_12393&ms=em20_200414_card1_engg_gq_ful__TM_ettx&refcode=em20_200414_card1_engg_gq_ful__TM_ettx&utm_campaign=em20_200414_card1_engg_gq_ful__TM_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mdli&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTUzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZDA4NDRkOS02YjdlLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mJ_vAlB8CeL8uzuKMAp1T__cIFvYUIvnTNHh50MZ5bY=&emci=ba0d79b5-5b7e-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=0d0844d9-6b7e-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=9593007)**

Thanks,

Team Michelle

P.S. Michelle just released her plans to ensure all Kansans have access to quality, affordable health care. **[You can read more about her plan here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17136840/183963381/598997009?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTUzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZDA4NDRkOS02YjdlLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mJ_vAlB8CeL8uzuKMAp1T__cIFvYUIvnTNHh50MZ5bY=&emci=ba0d79b5-5b7e-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=0d0844d9-6b7e-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=9593007)**

**Michelle De La Isla is running for Congress to fight for families across KS-02. We understand that you may have other financial priorities during this challenging time. While we would greatly appreciate your support, please only contribute what you can.**
[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17136841/183963382/284729925?gpsid=8_122_12394&refcode=em20_200414_card1_fnd_gq_ful__tm_ettx&utm_campaign=em20_200414_card1_fnd_gq_ful__tm_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mdli&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTUzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZDA4NDRkOS02YjdlLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mJ_vAlB8CeL8uzuKMAp1T__cIFvYUIvnTNHh50MZ5bY=)

PAID FOR BY MICHELLE FOR KANSAS
Michelle for Kansas

We are running a grassroots campaign, and that means we 're relying entirely on you and our grassroots team to get us to the finish line.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ATqs9L3mB3bRgGs-ppbr9-1l7ctsQrjmcROfm_iZcb2KUY089l1X73uWaMlwveZi0-Xog-YUYbNHF6evepTDghOHh9GPQPo7jzvjIqaHFg-y7bWUlrgeTP0a6qf77NWjv1Wp9ygHhrEBZQDj_hQXsF7BgZUhCMcN4XzTQuLtG60XjTpsVRHc2lARovoNBNFPjI6H1yUb3-JOW4iPgIU0D8u0UPUI1LaBBZFZOeY80tGACf0os2Cf0en8htmh8j2FMux3TrJ1OEbvPEGVc7SN9jY1hkPGycAngvmQrxKYXLD_O2n6vBKcjKKe4SobLMKpBQPfl6Xz965-xRMaJKdj_1QQYO4KsBSibZ28TevZ4g0=&c=vX-nfvseurrFnywDr9direngykML_h8uJYgY21A20UGwoSSwLY2-nA==&ch=6aFkXLZzUNRmfebHyviuBgFJnS4SbbD32xAVW81dTTKmaKN7z_p85A==)

name: Nicole Malliotakis
subject: A Big Step
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NICOLE FOR NEW YORK (FEDERAL)
body:
Friends, Over 18,000 of you signed a petition and even more joined me in being vocal against the disastrous bail reform which took effect on January 1st and reduced our safety and increased crime in our city and state.
| | | | [](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=139A186A1A2278)
---
| | |
---
| | Friends,

As we continue to fight COVID-19, I want to make sure you are also aware of significant changes we achieved to New York’s dangerous bail reform while we were in Albany earlier this month.

[Over 18,000 of you signed a petition](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=139A186A1A2279) and even more joined me in being vocal against the disastrous bail reform which took effect on January 1st and reduced our safety and increased crime in our city and state.

---
| | |
---
| | | | [](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=139A186A1A2280)
---
| | | At the beginning of March, Nicole was invited on FOX & Friends to discuss the bail reform and fixes to the law getting closer.

[WATCH NOW](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=139A186A1A2280)
---
| | |
---
| | Fixing the botched bail reform has been one of my top priorities and we’ve made progress under the one-party rule in Albany. After countless press conferences, community outrage, and pressure we put on Governor Cuomo and the Democrats, here’s what we achieved:

A large number of offenses were added to the list of "qualifying offenses" that are eligible for bail:

* Class A-I felony drug offenses;
* Sex trafficking;
* Money laundering in support of terrorism in the 3rd and 4th degrees;
* Strangulation
* Promoting a sexual performance by a child;
* Any crime that is alleged to cause the death of another person;
* Vehicular assault in the 1st degree;

---
| | |
---
| | [ SEE FULL LIST ](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=139A186A1A2281)
---
| | |
---
| | The changes also fixed issues that district attorneys had with discovery reform and better protects victims and witnesses personal information.

It's been a long-fought battle, but we persisted and were able to achieve significant changes to the botched bail reform adopted by the governor with one-party rule in last year’s budget. Not only did we add a significant number of offenses to those that qualify for bail, we added provisions to stop "unlimited chances" by ensuring that a person who either commits a crime after being released on their own recognizance, is on probation or is on post release supervision will have to face a judge in court who will be able to set bail.

---
| | |
---
| | | | [](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=139A186A1A2282)
---
| | | Appearing on Tucker Carlson Tonight in November 2019, Nicole brought national attention to New York's radical bail law and launched her petition.

[WATCH NOW](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=139A186A1A2282)
---
| | |
---
| | I'm happy to have worked with the District Attorneys’ Association, police unions, my colleagues and the public to demand common-sense changes to protect public safety.

While more still needs to be done, this is a big step in the right direction. Thank you for your help in making these improvements a reality.

Sincerely,
---
| |
---
| | Nicole Malliotakis

---
| | |
---
| | | | [](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=139A186A1A2283) | | [](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=139A186A1A2284) | | [](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=139A186A1A2285) | | [](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=139A186A1A2286)
---|---|---|---|---|---|---
| | |
---
| | | PAID FOR BY NICOLE FOR NEW YORK (FEDERAL)
---

name: Public Opinion Polls via Rita Hart for Congress
subject: [Yes/No] Do you support vote-by-mail?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rita Hart for Iowa
body:
| | | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/To45N7C-MYsF6wNpFl36c2kJigJUP5o9A7ZC4rOrd6A=/6crTlkK_qPbUSISoHT83EVtRxCO_8mIqqwy5ktgmV5Y=) Peter, Right now, it's important that we protect the ballot box by making voting as easy and convenient as possible. To address this, many advocates are calling for expanded vote-by-mail measures. _Vote-by-mail is the best way to participate in our democracy without worrying about whether you 'll be able to get to your voting place or risk sickness to make your voice heard. The Iowa Secretary of State's office already announced that it will mail absentee ballot request forms to every registered voter in Iowa ahead of our June 2nd primary. _ **[We want to know if you agree -- do you support expanded access to vote-by-mail enrollment? Take our 1-click survey today:](https://act.myngp.com/el/To45N7C-MYsF6wNpFl36c2kJigJUP5o9A7ZC4rOrd6A=/6crTlkK_qPbUSISoHT83EVtRxCO_8mIqqwy5ktgmV5Y=)** [Yes](https://act.myngp.com/el/To45N7C-MYsF6wNpFl36c2kJigJUP5o9A7ZC4rOrd6A=/6crTlkK_qPbUSISoHT83EVtRxCO_8mIqqwy5ktgmV5Y=) [No](https://act.myngp.com/el/To45N7C-MYsF6wNpFl36c2kJigJUP5o9A7ZC4rOrd6A=/6crTlkK_qPbUSISoHT83EVtRxCO_8mIqqwy5ktgmV5Y=) We need to ensure that everyone who wants to vote, can. That's why it's so important that we put policies in place that ensure it happens. It doesn't matter if they're a working parent, senior or person with limited access to transportation - everyone has a right to vote. Voting by mail is also secure -- as Kevin Hall, a spokesperson for the Secretary of State's office said, "We don't just blindly mail our ballots to people who don't request them... There have to be security provisions in place to ensure the integrity of the vote." Voting by mail is safe, secure and convenient. It's the way of the future. **[But we want to hear from you directly -- do you support expanded vote-by-mail access to keep our communities safe? Let us know today!](https://act.myngp.com/el/To45N7C-MYsF6wNpFl36c2kJigJUP5o9A7ZC4rOrd6A=/6crTlkK_qPbUSISoHT83EVtRxCO_8mIqqwy5ktgmV5Y=)** [Yes](https://act.myngp.com/el/To45N7C-MYsF6wNpFl36c2kJigJUP5o9A7ZC4rOrd6A=/6crTlkK_qPbUSISoHT83EVtRxCO_8mIqqwy5ktgmV5Y=) [No](https://act.myngp.com/el/To45N7C-MYsF6wNpFl36c2kJigJUP5o9A7ZC4rOrd6A=/6crTlkK_qPbUSISoHT83EVtRxCO_8mIqqwy5ktgmV5Y=) Thank you for participating,
Rita Hart for Congress | ******_**Rita Hart is a lifelong Iowan, farmer, 20-year educator, former State Senator and candidate for Congress in Iowa 's 2nd Congressional District. Help us send Rita to Washington by making a donation today!**_****** | ******[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.myngp.com/el/To45N7C-MYsF6wNpFl36c2kJigJUP5o9A7ZC4rOrd6A=/As-IEaie9aGkRhP-rhsqZ1DNcwz0v8TVcGUTm8khiyE=?refcode=200414-email)******

[WMUR had a very nice story about my first quarter fundraising](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xMzk5MjQ4NzM3MTU0MzczNDc1JmM9aTBvMCZlPTE5MjgmYj0zMzc3NTY3MTgmZD1yOGIybDBm.mynzlgPaqAWNPnH-hhY33-G0wtVaAET6n4CoZ9Z2nxg). **We had 338 individual donors which is nearly 4.5x more than the GOP nominee for Congress had in his first quarter in 2018!** I am proud to have the support of so many great Granite Staters and to be the _true_ New Hampshire candidate in this race! name: MJ Hegar Finance Team
subject: I'll be blunt: MJ is counting on you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
We need to show everyone that MJ has enough grassroots support not only to win our party's nomination, but also to beat Sen. Cornyn this November!

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489037f/7f51f7bc/4f4737da/4ef127f1/2115355809/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | | One-Day Goal:
$12,000

Deadline:
MIDNIGHT [**MAKE YOUR FIRST DONATION**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489037f/7f51f7bc/4f4737da/4ef127f0/2115355809/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEyMjIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-april-onedaygoal?refcode=email_20200414.1nd2__1222__&amount=10")
---
I'll be blunt, Peter:

I'm writing to ask you to **[make your first* donation before midnight to help us reach our $12,000 one-day goal](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489037f/7f51f7bc/4f4737da/4ef127f0/2115355809/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEyMjIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-april-onedaygoal?refcode=email_20200414.1nd2__1222__&amount=10")**. Give me just a few seconds and I'll explain why it's so important.

Here's the deal: Time is quickly running out before the runoff, and we need to show _everyone_ that MJ has enough grassroots support not only to win our party's nomination but also to beat Sen. Cornyn this November.

See, while **Sen. Cornyn is raking in checks from corporate PACs** and getting help from special interests like the Koch network, MJ is counting on YOU to help her build this grassroots movement. She isn't taking any corporate PAC money, which is how you know she'll be accountable to _you_ in the Senate.
[**PITCH IN NOW**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489037f/7f51f7bc/4f4737da/4ef127f0/2115355809/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEyMjIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-april-onedaygoal?refcode=email_20200414.1nd2__1222__&amount=10")
We haven't missed a goal yet, and I'm confident you won't let us down this time. **If just 164 donors pitch in before tonight 's midnight deadline, we'll reach our $12,000 one-day goal! Are you in?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $5>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489037f/7f51f7bc/4f4737da/4ef127f7/2115355809/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEyMjIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-april-onedaygoal?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200414.1nd2__1222__&amount=5")**
**[Express donate $10>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489037f/7f51f7bc/4f4737da/4ef127f6/2115355809/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEyMjIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-april-onedaygoal?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200414.1nd2__1222__&amount=10")**
**[Express donate $25>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489037f/7f51f7bc/4f4737da/4ef127f5/2115355809/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEyMjIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-april-onedaygoal?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200414.1nd2__1222__&amount=25")**
**[Express donate $50>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489037f/7f51f7bc/4f4737da/4ef127f4/2115355809/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEyMjIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-april-onedaygoal?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200414.1nd2__1222__&amount=50")**
**[Or, donate a different amount>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489037f/7f51f7bc/4f4737da/4ef127eb/2115355809/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEyMjIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-april-onedaygoal?refcode=email_20200414.1nd2__1222__")**
Thanks,
MJ Hegar Finance Team

*If you've already contributed to the campaign, thank you so much! Our records are based on donations associated with this email address in our online database, which may take some time to update.

[**DONATE**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489037f/7f51f7bc/4f4737da/4ef127f0/2115355809/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEyMjIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-april-onedaygoal?refcode=email_20200414.1nd2__1222__&amount=10")

|

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489037f/7f51f7bc/4f4737da/4ef127ea/2115355809/VEsHBA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEyMjIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=1222&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489037f/7f51f7bc/4f4737da/4ef127e9/2115355809/VEsHBw/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. name: Sandy Smith
subject: Butterfield: "Trump a Domestic Enemy"
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SANDY SMITH FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
| | | [ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=i_mLQXmt9pNxmng&b=qyjsrDq4cNFojKGJpY7GVw)
---
Dear Peter,
I'm Sandy Smith, the Republican nominee for Congress in North Carolina’s newly redrawn 1st Congressional district.

**You can't overstate how bad my Democrat opponent, G.K. Butterfield, really is.**

You may know that he serves as one of Nancy Pelosi's deputy whips. _That's why he votes nearly 100% with Pelosi!_

He is one of the most nakedly partisan liberals in Congress - he just doesn't care.

Did you know that he voted for impeachment- in the process, calling President Trump a "Domestic enemy"??? _Look at his own words_!

_“President Trump put himself before country and violated his oath of office. The oath I took is clear— I have sworn to support and defend the Constitution against all enemies, foreign and domestic. Based on the evidence before us, I voted in favor of both Articles of Impeachment against Donald J. Trump. No one is above the law.”_

_My opponent, Democrat G.K. Butterfield, supported impeachment, calling Trump a "domestic enemy"!_

This guy is just lost in Swamp-think, if he believes that upholding the Constitution means overturning an election based on "you just don't like the guy"!

The truth is, he doesn't even like to come back to the district anymore; he just LOVES staying in the Swamp and selling his soul!

You know what I think? **I think Butterfield and Pelosi are the "Domestic enemies", and that President Trump is a great man doing a great job!**

[If you agree that President Trump is doing a great job, and that the Democrats need to be out of power, I ask you to contribute $2](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=i_mLQXmt9pNxmng&b=qyjsrDq4cNFojKGJpY7GVw)[5, 50, 100, 500, or more to help me stand by the President and against the Democrats!](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=i_mLQXmt9pNxmng&b=qyjsrDq4cNFojKGJpY7GVw)

G.K. Butterfield is a leftist extremist, not a patriot, but to replace him I [really need your help](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=i_mLQXmt9pNxmng&b=qyjsrDq4cNFojKGJpY7GVw). I appreciate you and thank you.

For God and Country,
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=i_mLQXmt9pNxmng&b=qyjsrDq4cNFojKGJpY7GVw)

Sandy Smith
Republican for Congress, North Carolina's new First District
Conservative
Entrepreneur & Military mom

name: Stacey Abrams
subject: I'm with Reverend Warnock
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
Can we count on you, friend?

| | |
---
Friend,

This is a difficult time in our nation's history.

The threats we're facing - from foreign election interference to stagnating wages to global health crises - put the future of our democracy at risk.
That's why this year's elections are the most consequential of our lifetimes - and why it's never been more important to elect Democratic leaders who will fight for the most vulnerable among us. **That's why I endorsed Reverend Raphael Warnock for U.S. Senate in Georgia - [and why I'm asking you to support his campaign today.](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e742/288179be/a2758e9/348e809f/3199526842/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMTU1LWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk155-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
Reverend Warnock is the senior pastor at Ebenezer Baptist Church, the spiritual home of Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. If elected, he'd be the first black senator our state has _ever_ elected. Reverend Warnock is running to restore moral leadership to Washington and to stand up for Georgia families who have been left behind by Republicans like Mitch McConnell and Donald Trump.
With Republicans turning their backs on the hardworking people of Georgia, it's never been more important _ _ to elect leaders like Reverend Warnock who will lead _by and for the people_ - someone who will be a champion for voting rights, workers' rights, affordable health care and more.

Reverend Warnock gives me hope that we can create a better and brighter future for all, not just the lucky few.
But here's what's at stake: Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight says Democrats _can_ take back the Senate - but we _have_ to win in Georgia. Winning this battleground state is key to Democrats righting the ship and retaking the Senate majority.
**Right now, Reverend Warnock is up against a _crucial_ fundraising deadline - but with time running out, he's still falling short and can't make up the difference without your support. So I have to ask: ****[Please, friend, will you give $5 or more now- before midnight tonight - to help Reverend Warnock flip Georgia blue and take back the Senate for Democrats?](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e742/288179be/a2758e9/348e809f/3199526842/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMTU1LWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk155-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
Thanks for fighting with us.

Stacey Abrams
| | [Contribute](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e742/288179be/a2758e9/348e809f/3199526842/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMTU1LWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk155-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")

body:
There are two big deadlines coming up tomorrow. The first is the FEC filing deadline, where every candidate will officially file their first quarterly report of 2020 and show how much they’ve raised this year. | | | [
](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/EAE/ni0YAA/t.30x/IhDuX5feSqeS66zOHFD1xg/h0/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNJXz0vuthnEjtT1eBbnubOAo-2BOCcr-2FdKsg6Bjtf-2Bz4CLekFiDdN3Llz2iX9T-2Bw1evNzouab8DJstn-2BKk3Q0l7FRAcigxCsq5RW1C8Qsu3f-2BfBNlu1KuV2s4pQ1IhKdgttTzoK5oMCXVose6Aw3qc8PwwYnfpIoBWCCysZWnuxMeT8dXYX9Y1jjAKxdDJo-2Bwy-2F1vvbIG4CHP4OiCg7iVM0Nl6JKe5yjFes-2FdJ4N4FiL3UQ79tZ7ifSLWDXxcFYS1xVc-3D/SFIp) Friend, There are two big deadlines coming up tomorrow. The first is the FEC filing deadline, where every candidate will officially file their first quarterly report of 2020 and show how much they’ve raised this year. We’ve already announced that we’ve raised $340,000 this past quarter and over $830,000 over the course of our campaign. We did that without corporate PAC donations and without self-funding, unlike our opponents. **_In fact, 80% of our donations were small-dollar contributions of $200 or less._**
The other big deadline is our April mid-month fundraising deadline. We’ve done a great job fundraising so far, but we are falling behind right now. **_We’re about $4,750 away from where we need to be at this point in the month._** One of our opponents has already spent nearly $400,000 on TV ads and will likely announce tomorrow that he has put hundreds of thousands, if not millions, of dollars more of his own money into his campaign. We don’t have that kind of personal wealth, but we do have supporters like you. **_[Can you make a donation today to help us hit our mid-month goal and get us to where we need to be?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/EAE/ni0YAA/t.30x/IhDuX5feSqeS66zOHFD1xg/h1/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNJXz0vuthnEjtT1eBbnubOAo-2BOCcr-2FdKsg6Bjtf-2Bz4CLUoTK9Pe00ki73gAC89im-2FxfCivUcmBBYiw4JwWJBUGEjTXnp-2B-2BwLshoZPcyvGGfObtwknQc0uhlQUel3omaMgkGgb1fFoDDyM-2F-2FmOhOOwZEQ7TOdqo3MdZDv-2BwjDJ4egDm6lyv7rFre7xriI-2BU7-2FG50C9iQRUvxZ2KeqaOhTPsqMnmt5n4Lr6otRGCM-2Bb4AJeV-2Fn4fzUJYgUFAVkndUP-2BI-3D/MQyv)_**
[Donate >>](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/EAE/ni0YAA/t.30x/IhDuX5feSqeS66zOHFD1xg/h2/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNJXz0vuthnEjtT1eBbnubOAo-2BOCcr-2FdKsg6Bjtf-2Bz4CLbxpw9dXt0-2BDFpxQZaEx35ij-2FjjFF7SLWK6xwMrdGiuuPaflNRn6sT6eseTWIJkD72XSG-2BjvfOp2iKxGTtCawgj4eRfgTHP2ajfbBXeaIYuYCV0rLbzV-2BrYAf56yF8x8Eb4n4GhdnkUmjfg78GaG92Ixw-2BSY0D4I7JtrKIUUXJSSbNB5UxK0pxAnduoXKLgcgiQ-2Brii6L1iMsiN3SI-2B-2BHP0-3D/46_X)
Times are hard right now, and I understand that not everyone is in a position to support the campaign. **_[But if you can, I hope you will consider making a contribution today.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/EAE/ni0YAA/t.30x/IhDuX5feSqeS66zOHFD1xg/h3/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNJXz0vuthnEjtT1eBbnubOAo-2BOCcr-2FdKsg6Bjtf-2Bz4CLXUXZOy1nsBj-2F3-2Bz2hMH2lNY-2BPKMMukmO-2ByCbGMI-2Fw-2F1PImN-2FwBVwxjkBuJ4hkC5kcwUEC6oJmcV03f8STxnCSQwiFoKAj7pC3nZx1gtt0PQOe49baTsl8w5gU1VJhM9sgiFCJofMc-2FT8MGhnIQWzii4AOSNFYDM79HUM8nFQVDRhYLSMnv49jbUlf6X2gKygbiDfZ-2B5REdkbpwHU-2Fm4kGM-3D/y1LJ)_** Now more than ever, we need leaders in Washington who will fight for working families. We need leaders who know that a one-time $1,200 check from the government isn’t enough. I know what it’s like growing up struggling to make rent or put food on the table. When I go to Washington, those experiences will inform everything I do. **_[Will you help me get there?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/EAE/ni0YAA/t.30x/IhDuX5feSqeS66zOHFD1xg/h4/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNJXz0vuthnEjtT1eBbnubOAo-2BOCcr-2FdKsg6Bjtf-2Bz4CLf3JvOhTif-2BI6gzAnHWnkxHzUbajpkAxVFoArHPapdaWoZJaoTttZzrUDn3qiQVNcUyk0BEUIeClpxDWXU5BkdsL4v-2Fpw-2Bs-2Fd-2FGdF0IGEXP-2BFapxlfhbyvpfUQ5QzhcLOR9f-2Bag-2BjQPZw7LeJi6-2F08amtZHqGSQC-2B-2FyENgFbC2kh-2BVSIJaMCqWz1WXsAqE5S6yT-2F4fl8ilgd5csZE5EnJZI-3D/zWWt)_**

Thank you, Mondaire

name: Archie =?utf-8?b?KFRpbmHigJlz?= husband)
subject: What’s Tina up to?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
|
#
Hi there, Archie here — Tina’s husband. Things are very different from the last time we talked, and I know times are tough for a lot of us. I hope you and your loved ones are staying safe and healthy. Tina and I have been practicing social distancing and staying home, and trying to get a few walks in. As you probably would have guessed, Tina’s working around the clock and fighting her heart out to help Minnesotans survive this economic and public health crisis. Except now, she’s doing it from home, with help from Moose and me. But that’s just Tina. I’ve always been blown away by how hard she works and how dedicated she is to helping others. Now, she needs _our_ help. Tina is facing an important fundraising deadline in just a few short days. Listen, I was serving up burgers when I first met Tina. We were in grad school, and now we’ve been married for more than 35 years.
When we moved to Minnesota the summer we got married, we were in our twenties with mounds of school loans and a beat-up orange car with no defroster. We were the kids driving with the windows down at 20 below to keep ice from forming on the inside of the windshield!
I just want you to know how proud I am of Tina. I wish everyone could see her as I do — the woman who loves her friends and family, bakes pies for our birthdays, laughs a lot, and wears her heart on her sleeve. We have always supported each other, and now I’m glad I can be the one who makes sure she eats dinner when she's home (though I still don't understand why she doesn't love my famous country risotto).

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Coronavirus Shows the World Health Organization in Dire Need of Reform
body:
"Purposely or not, by praising China’s response to a virus the WHO first denied and then lied about, this longtime paragon of public health..." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a50d2ed9a7&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Coronavirus Shows the World Health Organization in Dire Need of Reform**

“Purposely or not, by praising China’s response to a virus the WHO first denied and then lied about, this longtime paragon of public health is fueling a ‘China versus the world’ showdown,” Adam Goodman writes in Fox News.

By enabling the Chinese government’s misconduct, “the WHO has become the new poster child for international organizations so bloated with bureaucracy and punctuated by politics they’ve turned into something well beyond what they were intended to be.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=bf6263e725&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “New York Gov. Andrew Cuomo gave high praise to President Trump for his handling of the coronavirus pandemic in his state, saying the president remains ‘amazingly accessible’ and has ‘delivered’ where it counts.” Gov. Cuomo said that “if you do the right thing by New York, I’ll say it,” Jessica Chasmar reports for [_The Washington Times_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=bb5d5dc586&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “A World Health Organization official said Monday that she suspected human-to-human transmission of the novel coronavirus ‘right from the start,’ beginning on Dec. 31, 2019. But WHO officials echoed Chinese authorities and denied any suggestion of human-to-human transmission for weeks,” Peter Hasson writes for [_The Daily Caller_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=dba16d1775&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “President Donald Trump recently announced that Colorado would be receiving an additional 100 ventilators from FEMA’s national stockpile to combat COVID-19. This should be a moment of celebration for Coloradans suffering from COVID-19 and their families,” Jeff Hunt writes in [_The Denver Post_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2ebd078100&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

| New Hampshire is facing an unprecedented health and economic crisis due to the Corona Virus. Governor Sununu has taken strong and decisive actions to protect our state and all of its hard-working residents. Governor Sununu appointed Banking Commissioner Jerry Little to oversee distribution of federal funds designed to help health care providers, small businesses, unemployed people, cities and towns, first responders and taxpayers. As part of this effort Governor Sununu has appointed eight legislators from both parties from the House and Senate to provide necessary advice to Commissioner Little. As Governor Sununu has repeatedly stated it is critically important that these needed resources go to hard working people without delay and without special interest politics. The Senate Republican caucus will stand with our Governor as he does everything possible to protect the health of New Hampshire residents and get our state open for business as soon as safely possible. \- The NH Senate Republicans

He’s called himself a Trump “whisperer” and “co-pilot.” Now this erratic, unstable president is creating chaos at a time of crisis, and Georgia’s Senator Perdue is derelict in his duty by enabling it. **We must defeat Perdue.**

Perdue stood by Trump’s ‘shithole countries’ racism, his invitation of foreign interference into our elections, and his reckless tax cuts that have blown up our national debt and are directly undermining our pandemic response right now. **While Trump refuses to lead during a time of public health and economic crisis, Perdue uses classified coronavirus information to self-deal in the stock market.**

The president’s claim of “total authority” over our country and 50 states is breathtakingly wrong and dangerous, but I’m not counting on David Perdue remaining true to his so-called “small government” philosophy or finally standing up to this president. **So I’m standing up to both of them.**

**[I need you with me in order to win. We need to raise $6,112 before midnight to hit our mid-month goal and not fall behind before the next FEC deadline. He’s called himself a Trump “whisperer” and “co-pilot.” | | | | = ** | | David Perdue has enabled and encouraged this president from the start, friends. He’s called himself a Trump “whisperer” and “co-pilot.” Now this erratic, unstable president is creating chaos at a time of crisis, and Georgia’s Senator Perdue is derelict in his duty by enabling it. We must defeat Perdue. Perdue stood by Trump’s ‘shithole countries’ racism, his invitation of foreign interference into our elections, and his reckless tax cuts that have blown up our national debt and are directly undermining our pandemic response right now. While Trump refuses to lead during a time of public health and economic crisis, Perdue uses classified coronavirus information to self-deal in the stock market. The president’s claim of “total authority” over our country and 50 states is breathtakingly wrong and dangerous, but I’m not counting on David Perdue remaining true to his so-called “small government” philosophy or finally standing up to this president. name: Team Booker
subject: The USPS might be closing in June
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
Take 30 seconds to act now and help save the USPS.
#
Every day, it seems like there's a new disappointment from our government. The latest in this series: **the United States Postal Service might be gone by June due to a lack of funding.**
**[Join Charles and the rest of Team Booker in signing this petition demanding that Congress include immediate emergency funding to the United States Postal Service in the next coronavirus stimulus bill.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17140662/184042121/-1095705039?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMTBkNGQ3MS04YzdlLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lyy9NrhkBdYe_wWv5BAwvwpZwjUq2TvBbxJAnHHQOOI=&emci=c053a13f-867e-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=e10d4d71-8c7e-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=2635570)**
****[Sign the petition](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17140663/184042122/-1095705039?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMTBkNGQ3MS04YzdlLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lyy9NrhkBdYe_wWv5BAwvwpZwjUq2TvBbxJAnHHQOOI=&emci=c053a13f-867e-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=e10d4d71-8c7e-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=2635570)****
The loss of our Postal Service would mean so many things.
* No jobs for hundreds of thousands of postal workers nationwide.
* No ways for residents of rural areas to get essential supplies delivered, including life-saving medications.
* No methods for small businesses to ship their goods and stay afloat.
* No vote-by-mail during a crucial election year.

And that's just scratching the surface.
**Despite all this, Donald Trump is hellbent on letting the Postal Service die.** He even went so far as to say he will not sign a relief bill if funding for the Postal Service is included in it.
What's more, two House Representatives sent a letter to Mitch McConnell _last week_ urging him to help answer the call and help the Postal Service to no response.
We need your help now to stop Trump and McConnell from halting the Postal Service. **[Will you take 30 seconds to sign this petition demanding that Congress save the United States Postal Service and develop a plan for immediate relief?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17140664/184042123/-1095705039?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMTBkNGQ3MS04YzdlLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lyy9NrhkBdYe_wWv5BAwvwpZwjUq2TvBbxJAnHHQOOI=&emci=c053a13f-867e-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=e10d4d71-8c7e-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=2635570)**
****[Sign the petition](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17140665/184042124/-1095705039?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMTBkNGQ3MS04YzdlLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lyy9NrhkBdYe_wWv5BAwvwpZwjUq2TvBbxJAnHHQOOI=&emci=c053a13f-867e-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=e10d4d71-8c7e-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=2635570)****

name: John Cornyn
subject: Biden….
body:
Friend, I'm sure you saw, but recently, Joe Biden became the Democrats' presumptive nominee for president of the United States.
While some breathe a sigh of relief now that socialism-pedaling Bernie Sanders is out of the race, I want to send you a special note of caution.
Joe Biden has a history of painting a target on Texas. name: Rodney Davis
subject: I'm worried.
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Rodney for Congress
body:
Here's the situation: a dark money Super PAC, House Majority Forward, has launched TV and digital ads in Illinois to prop up my radical opponent, Betsy "Leftwing" Londrigan in advance of November's election.
Friend,
I'm worried.
Here's the situation: a dark money Super PAC, House Majority Forward, has launched TV and digital ads in Illinois to prop up my radical opponent, Betsy "Leftwing" Londrigan in advance of November's election.

body:
We're in the process of reviewing our budget between now and November, and we've noticed a couple areas within our strategy that need strengthening.
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/7jyAKgtxzzcj9hF1rtBzoR1l3x9uyAlwxuQLnM4Vz_s=/ztOfyXCFRZQLEyedXPkP1drr_FEYNU2_yNVqiMq1pGg=?refcode=Em_fr_2020.04.14_TS_A_all&amount=15)

| _Sri and our entire team hopes you and your loved ones are staying safe and healthy during these trying times. As we work together as one nation to fight COVID-19, we know enormous financial and personal stress has been put on countless families. While we remain committed to doing all we can to flip this district and bring true leadership to TX-22, we understand that this may not be a good time for you to donate. We hope, however, that you 'll continue to stay with us as we work for a better Texas.

Please visit our [COVID-19 community resource guide](https://act.myngp.com/el/7jyAKgtxzzcj9hF1rtBzoR1l3x9uyAlwxuQLnM4Vz_s=/hRO57RDeITMyygQQtjzexD5mSkDiqPkxKKjaf-kH7t8=) to find ways you can individually take action to support frontline responders and keep our family safe._

* * *

We're in the process of reviewing our budget between now and November, and we've noticed a couple areas within our strategy that need strengthening.

name: Melissa Hortman
subject: Emergency insulin passes the Minnesota House
disclaimer_text: paid for by the DFL House Caucus
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZCgxYuoyWR0e161l7Q6bj2fR8_PYr8ZUE4pUQrYyKfo=/arpYZfltEXhamgBQAboot255pBI92DHB4mcOrdAUpjo=?refcode=041420)
| | Friend, Last year over 30,000 Minnesotans signed our petition urging action on the rising cost and reduced access of insulin. **Today, after over a year of negotiations with Senate Republicans, we passed the Alec Smith Insulin Affordability Act.** The Alec Smith Insulin Affordability Act will ensure that insulin-dependent Minnesotans who are uninsured, under-insured, and Medicare recipients and cannot afford their insulin can access a 30-day supply at a pharmacy for only $35. While this negotiation began long before the COVID-19 pandemic, it remains an extremely important issue for Minnesotans who need access to this life-saving medication. No one should lose their life because they can't afford their medication. Thank you to all of the insulin advocates, the family of Alec Smith, and our bill authors for working tirelessly on this issue for so long. **This is a long overdue step in the right direction to bring down the cost of prescription drugs for everyone.** Thank you, **Melissa Hortman** Speaker Minnesota House of Representatives [**Donate**](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZCgxYuoyWR0e161l7Q6bj2fR8_PYr8ZUE4pUQrYyKfo=/arpYZfltEXhamgBQAboot255pBI92DHB4mcOrdAUpjo=?refcode=041420)
---
| Prepared and paid for by the DFL House Caucus.
---

Saint Paul MN 55107 United States

---
| |
[](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=0457319d3a&e=f1831b4ca2)
---
| | Friends,

**"Extraordinary**."

That word has a lot of meaning. I’ve been blessed to have faced several hardships early in life only to turn things around - turning failures into successes - it's been extraordinary -- that’s for sure. It taught me that life is a series of second chances and the harder you work, sometimes the better your luck.

>From being the **first female to graduate from The Citadel** , to being a **mom** , **business owner** and **state legislator** \- I feel very humbled by these experiences because I never in a million years thought I'd be where I am today.

“**Extraordinary** ” is also the title of [my first TV ad](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=b6d76f5a50&e=f1831b4ca2) in my campaign to take back the 1st Congressional District.
---
| [ ](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=5f3d53bceb&e=f1831b4ca2)
---
"**EXTRAORDINARY** "
| **_I hope you’ll _do two things today_ :_**

**_First_** , **watch it** and let me know what you think, and [**share it**](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=e021c60278&e=f1831b4ca2)with your friends, family and on your social media.

That’s very important to helping us share our message.

**_Second_** , I hope you’ll **help me keep this ad on the air**.
I’ve purchased $30,000 worth of TV ads on cable and satellite for the next two weeks.

But I need to put on another $150,000 at least through Election Day.

Will you help us today?
---
| [DONATE $10](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=cee7dac2ee&e=f1831b4ca2 "DONATE $10")
---
| [DONATE $25](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=6b9c61e0b4&e=f1831b4ca2 "DONATE $25")
---
| [DONATE $50](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=06b8b33a57&e=f1831b4ca2 "DONATE $50")
---
| You see, **my Democrat opponent has all the special interest dollars. **

And my Republican opponent is trying to _**buy the election with her own money**_ and has self-funded more than a quarter of a million dollars so far.

I have to raise every penny. That's why I am working so hard to earn this seat, not try to buy it.

__**That’s why I need your help**__. I don’t need to match their spending, but I do need to get my message out. **_Will you help me do that today?_**
---
| [DONATE TO KEEP NANCY'S AD ON THE AIR](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=27535c9996&e=f1831b4ca2 "DONATE TO KEEP NANCY'S AD ON THE AIR")
---
| I hope you agree, we have a great ad. I think you’ll especially like what **Vice President Mike Pence** has to say in it ([**_WATCH IT!!_**](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=3773f1bdaa&e=f1831b4ca2))!!

I am working hard in this campaign, just like I always do. My life has always included a healthy dose of **hard work, blessings and help from others along the way.**

I’ll keep working hard and I hope you’ll keep providing the help we need to win this race and take back the Lowcountry.

Most sincerely,

[](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=920470efae&e=f1831b4ca2)
---
|
---

Just like you, we've been missing President Obama's steadfast leadership --**that 's why we're so THRILLED about this huge announcement!**
[](https://go.protectvoting.%3D%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/vpp_biden_obama?refcode=VPP_EM_FR_200414_ObamaEndorsement_U1_X1&amount=25&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_200414_ObamaEndorsement_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_FR_200414_ObamaEndorsement_U1_X1")
Joe just got the endorsement of one of the most popular politicians on the planet -- **and Trump is TERRIFIED that it will lead to a huge wave of support!**
[**Obama 's endorsement is already causing a SURGE of Democratic support nationwide -- will you join us and pitch in to BEAT TRUMP and help 44 elect 46?**](https://go.protectvoting.%3D%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/vpp_biden_obama?refcode=VPP_EM_FR_200414_ObamaEndorsement_U1_X1&amount=25&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=4+-+Obamarsquos+endorsement+is+already+causi&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_200414_ObamaEndorsement_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_FR_200414_ObamaEndorsement_U1_X1")

We can't think of a bigger contrast than **Obama 's calm, measured leadership** and **Trump 's chaotic, ineffective mess.**
[](https://go.protectvoting.%3D%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/vpp_biden_obama?refcode=VPP_EM_FR_200414_ObamaEndorsement_U1_X1&amount=25&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=11&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_200414_ObamaEndorsement_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_FR_200414_ObamaEndorsement_U1_X1")
Now that Joe has this powerful endorsement, **it 's up to US to step up and pitch in to elect Biden and down-ballot Democrats across the country.**
There's SO MUCH at stake in 2020 -- our health care, our voting rights, and our checks and balances are all under attack, and this is our only chance to save them!
**President Obama is counting on us to step up --[will you join him and thousands of your fellow Democrats and pitch in today?](https://go.protectvoting.%3D%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/vpp_biden_obama?refcode=VPP_EM_FR_200414_ObamaEndorsement_U1_X1&amount=25&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=12+-+will+you+join+him+and+thousands+of+your+&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_200414_ObamaEndorsement_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_FR_200414_ObamaEndorsement_U1_X1")**

"" Now that Joe has this powerful endorsement, it 's up to US to step up and pitch in to elect Biden and down-ballot Democrats across the country. There's SO MUCH at stake in 2020 -- our health care, our voting rights, and our checks and balances are all under attack, and this is our only chance to save them! President Obama is counting on us to step up -- ""** | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" Change we can believe in, \-- the Voter Protection Project | "" | | Paid for by the Voter Protection Project and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee. If you'd like to support the Voter Protection Project, you can "" We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can "" If you'd like to unsubscribe from all our emails, ""

name: Christy Smith
subject: I'm more motivated than ever >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| []()
---

| | Peter --

We are seeing right now the critical importance of good leadership.

States that haven't taken action early in this crisis are struggling right now, while right here in California, we no longer have a shortage of personal protective equipment because of the quick work of Governor Newsom. He put his head down, didn't listen to the attacks from Republicans, and got to work to protect his constituents.

We need that type of leadership in Congress as well -- and that's why I'm more motivated than ever in this election. I will cut through the noise from the president and the Republican party and will get right to work to make sure we are prepared to get through the next phase of the pandemic.

**But to be honest with you, Peter, I'm a little stressed about the amount of money Republicans are spending on this race.**

Republican special interest groups are pumping a lot of cash into Garcia's campaign coffers, while we won't accept a nickel from corporate PACs. It's having a big impact. That's why our race rating was changed to a Toss-Up by two reputable political insiders last week.

**[In response, we set an ambitious -- but necessary -- fundraising goal to meet by midnight. If you have a few spare dollars, can you please chip in to my campaign?](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8a1/29776869/a398b86/569f459c/121883722/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MTRfdmJtdXBkYXRlbm9uIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200414_vbmupdatenon")** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [Express Donate $5](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8a1/29776869/a398b86/569f459d/121883722/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MTRfdmJtdXBkYXRlbm9uIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200414_vbmupdatenon&express_lane=true&amount=5") | [Express Donate $25](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8a1/29776869/a398b86/569f459e/121883722/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MTRfdmJtdXBkYXRlbm9uIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200414_vbmupdatenon&express_lane=true&amount=25")
---|---
[Express Donate $50](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8a1/29776869/a398b86/569f459f/121883722/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MTRfdmJtdXBkYXRlbm9uIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200414_vbmupdatenon&express_lane=true&amount=50") | [Express Donate $100](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8a1/29776869/a398b86/569f4598/121883722/VEsD/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MTRfdmJtdXBkYXRlbm9uIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200414_vbmupdatenon&express_lane=true&amount=100")
[Express Donate $250](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8a1/29776869/a398b86/569f4599/121883722/VEsA/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MTRfdmJtdXBkYXRlbm9uIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200414_vbmupdatenon&express_lane=true&amount=250") | [Donate Other Amount](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8a1/29776869/a398b86/569f459c/121883722/VEsB/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MTRfdmJtdXBkYXRlbm9uIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200414_vbmupdatenon")
This race is neck-and-neck, and given the unusual circumstances of this campaign, it is hard for anyone to predict the outcome.

But what I know is this: We are running a race filled with compassion, leadership, and heart. We are focused on lifting others up and giving people a helping hand when they need it -- **and right now, a lot of people need it.**

These qualities are what we need in Congress right now, and they are what I will bring to Washington when elected.

**[I need you to step up right now to help us cross the finish line with the resources we need. Ballots will be hitting mailboxes any day, and our campaign is upping our voter outreach efforts despite the onslaught of negativity from my opponent. Can you make a contribution of any amount today?](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8a1/29776869/a398b86/569f459c/121883722/VEsO/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MTRfdmJtdXBkYXRlbm9uIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200414_vbmupdatenon")**

Thank you so much. I hope you and your loved ones are safe and well.

\-- Christy
[DONATE](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8a1/29776869/a398b86/569f459c/121883722/VEsP/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MTRfdmJtdXBkYXRlbm9uIn0%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200414_vbmupdatenon")

_The number one priority during this time is to make sure everyone helps mitigate the spread of COVID-19 in California and across the country. Our campaign is doing our part by canceling all in-person events, moving to a digital operation, and supporting local efforts to help those in need. Emails like this are a critical part of our ability to run a strong campaign that can win._

name: Jason Lewis
subject: I know you’re busy, but can you do this before Midnight tomorrow? We have a big goal to meet and I need your help.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Lewis for Senate
body:
Friend -

I know you're busy, so I won't take up too much of your time.

Our April fundraising deadline is quickly coming up at the end of the month and my team also set a mid-month deadline to make sure we can hit our goals.

We're coming up a bit short of our mid-month goal and need 192 more patriots to chip in $25 in order to hit it. [Will you chip in by 11:59 tonight](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016I-xem7_YG-e3zBiITg3MvkaoFSNLhAuxrU1hNdFI6oMN-Ia_qVC9JeCFAG05QuTBefkhTeO9CvHM6uiYZDpsp_9-jWvP2-cMXnAydA7T142X5UQWi1Ce-cjGcvUNRwnH3dfbCOsT9Z04_dQN2VbbPGj7K-iJdQ_g8HoqZ8w9TAdUwvR1DANIcWYL669PzLhoYLl6W0LhoEcNqD4VHsJIE15-nNVeUM-0SjvomUBOZoKV4ZOO7SWkJsewbBJA5e0hKG5N_Ehy2izPCxBpS1lwUhf-pYSu1fTflQsQywb8d3GT_Q45HGuqFswgslypXha9m6FoZAXBSENDqR2X_xZvLEo3DWf7K-kZX9BwIYN3MI=&c=Z6v4-qIwWRj1zTGLtHGNKmVRbZJlazeFnknNY6X2sA9TzEKN1rdvew==&ch=ugBPAER8Uh-SsGxRaPAci8mQ_gATIS1QeFNkDirJCEOTWrwEkBnpig==)[?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016I-xem7_YG-e3zBiITg3MvkaoFSNLhAuxrU1hNdFI6oMN-Ia_qVC9JeCFAG05QuTBefkhTeO9CvHM6uiYZDpsp_9-jWvP2-cMXnAydA7T142X5UQWi1Ce-cjGcvUNRwnH3dfbCOsT9Z04_dQN2VbbPGj7K-iJdQ_g8HoqZ8w9TAdUwvR1DANIcWYL669PzLhoYLl6W0LhoEcNqD4VHsJIE15-nNVeUM-0SjvomUBOZoKV4ZOO7SWkJsewbBJA5e0hKG5N_Ehy2izPCxBpS1lwUhf-pYSu1fTflQsQywb8d3GT_Q45HGuqFswgslypXha9m6FoZAXBSENDqR2X_xZvLEo3DWf7K-kZX9BwIYN3MI=&c=Z6v4-qIwWRj1zTGLtHGNKmVRbZJlazeFnknNY6X2sA9TzEKN1rdvew==&ch=ugBPAER8Uh-SsGxRaPAci8mQ_gATIS1QeFNkDirJCEOTWrwEkBnpig==) 3X match is ACTIVE:

name: Mitch McConnell
subject: We're at a disadvantage
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MCCONNELL SENATE COMMITTEE
body:
First, failed presidential candidate Mike Bloomberg made an $18 MILLION donation to the Democratic Party.
Then, the LARGEST Democratic PAC announced a nearly $70 MILLION ad buy in competitive Republican states across the country.

Now, my opponent just announced that she nearly DOUBLED our Q1 fundraising total.

name: Jeff Van Drew
subject: This is critical.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Drew for Congress
body:
As your Congressman, I stood up to the Democrat establishment putting my principles over politics when Nancy Pelosi ordered me to vote for Donald Trump's impeachment.
Friend,
As we move further into 2020, we find ourselves at a critical point in this campaign.
It's never been more important to have the needed resources to properly defend South Jersey in November.
This week, we got more news that this district is once again the #1 target in New Jersey for the far Left, as it was announced that one of our liberal opponents, Amy Kennedy, outraised us in the first quarter!
**It 's going to take an influx of grassroots supporters from patriots, just like you, donating over this critical second quarter to help us defend South Jersey from the Kennedy political machine mobilizing in support of one of their own**.
It's no secret that the far Left is stopping at nothing to win back this district, including supporting far left candidate Amy Kennedy, a member of the Kennedy political machine!
As your Congressman, I stood up to the Democrat establishment putting my principles over politics when Nancy Pelosi ordered me to vote for Donald Trump's impeachment.
Standing up for this district is what always will be most important to me. My team and I need your help now more than ever if we're going to successfully defend South Jersey in November from the far Left's new chosen candidate to face me in the Fall.

body:

|

[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890379/7f51f7bc/4f59e695/4ef12834/3380637378/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | **Peter** , we're in the middle of an important runoff election that'll determine who takes on Senator Cornyn in November. **We know that MJ is the best candidate to face him** , and we need to make sure that when she wins the runoff, she's in the best position possible to take him on.

More than 35,000 people have already donated, but we still need **19 new donors** by midnight to reach our goal for the day! **[Will you join the fight NOW?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890379/7f51f7bc/4f59e695/4ef1282b/3380637378/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEyMjEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-april-onedaygoal?refcode=email_20200414.2nd__1221__&amount=10")**

\-- Taylor Klos, TX Finance Director

\---------- Forwarded Message ----------

Sender: MJ Hegar Finance Team
Subject: I'll be blunt: MJ is counting on you

> | One-Day Goal:
> $12,000
>
> Deadline:
> MIDNIGHT [**MAKE YOUR FIRST DONATION**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890379/7f51f7bc/4f59e695/4ef1282b/3380637378/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEyMjEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-april-onedaygoal?refcode=email_20200414.2nd__1221__&amount=10")
> ---
> I'll be blunt, Peter:
>
> I'm writing to ask you to **[make your first* donation before midnight to help us reach our $12,000 one-day goal](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890379/7f51f7bc/4f59e695/4ef1282b/3380637378/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEyMjEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-april-onedaygoal?refcode=email_20200414.2nd__1221__&amount=10")**. Give me just a few seconds and I'll explain why it's so important.
>
> Here's the deal: Time is quickly running out before the runoff, and we need to show _everyone_ that MJ has enough grassroots support not only to win our party's nomination but also to beat Sen. Cornyn this November.
>
> See, while **Sen. Cornyn is raking in checks from corporate PACs** and getting help from special interests like the Koch network, MJ is counting on YOU to help her build this grassroots movement. She isn't taking any corporate PAC money, which is how you know she'll be accountable to _you_ in the Senate.
> [**PITCH IN NOW**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890379/7f51f7bc/4f59e695/4ef1282b/3380637378/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEyMjEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-april-onedaygoal?refcode=email_20200414.2nd__1221__&amount=10")
> We haven't missed a goal yet, and I'm confident you won't let us down this time. **If just 164 donors pitch in before tonight 's midnight deadline, we'll reach our $12,000 one-day goal! Are you in?**
> _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

body:
Friend,
Montanans and all Americans are going through a difficult time right now, but by working together we will get through this crisis together.
It certainly has been an unconventional start to the election year. Before Coronavirus suspended our normal campaign schedule, we were amazed to see how active the D.C. special interests have been focusing on our state.
Chuck Schumer went as far as convincing failed presidential candidate, Gov. Steve Bullock to run for Montana's Senate seat so that national Democrat donors would have reason to spend even more money in our state this Fall.
Now with Schumer and his counterpart in the House, Nancy Pelosi, convincing their high dollar donors and corporate Super PACs that Montana is ripe for the picking, the far Left is even more motivated to win here.
In Congress, Greg has seen firsthand how Nancy Pelosi and Chuck Schumer operate -- both focusing more on politics than enacting legislation that puts Americans first! _**The Democrats that are running for Governor are no different than this!**_
If the far Left gets their way this November, they'll have complete control over our state. To put an immediate stop to this, we're calling on conservatives across the country to help Greg win Montana's key Governor's race in November.
